bio: Son of [Yadollah Sahabi](/people/yadollah-sahabi). Co-founder of the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran). Imprisoned 3 times under the Pahlavi regime (10.8 years total) and twice under the Islamic Republic (1.3 years). Active in nationalist-religious opposition politics. Co-founded the [Council of Nationalist-Religious Activists](/orgs/council-of-nationalist-religious-activists) in 2000.
editorial_notes: Son of Yadollah Sahabi. Multiple imprisonments under both regimes.
